notes: Filter primarily on categoryGroup (8 buckets); category (22) is a finer secondary cut.
Filter primarily on coverage; lga is supplementary and often null for national/statewide services.
flags.aod and flags.legal are present in the source data but their accuracy has not been verified — do not surface as user-facing filters in v1.
social media may contain any of: facebook, instagram, linkedin, twitter, youtube, tiktok.

coverageTiers.definition: Multi-LGA region (e.g. Western Sydney, SW Sydney)

otherDirectories.name: Name
otherDirectories.bestFor: Best For
otherDirectories.notes: Notes

otherDirectories.name: Ask Izzy
otherDirectories.bestFor: Homelessness, food, health, money, family violence, legal — searchable by suburb
otherDirectories.notes: Free, anonymous. Used by frontline workers across Australia. SMS-friendly.

otherDirectories.name: healthdirect Service Finder
otherDirectories.bestFor: GPs, pharmacies, hospitals, mental health, women's health, allied health
otherDirectories.notes: Government-funded; verified clinical services.

otherDirectories.name: DSS Service Finder
otherDirectories.bestFor: DSS-funded services: family/relationship, settlement, financial counselling, problem gambling
otherDirectories.notes: Authoritative for federally-funded community services.

otherDirectories.name: My Aged Care Service Finder
otherDirectories.operator: Department of Health and Aged Care
otherDirectories.bestFor: Aged care providers, home care, residential care
otherDirectories.notes: Required gateway for Cwlth-subsidised aged care.

otherDirectories.name: NDIS Provider Finder
otherDirectories.bestFor: NDIS-registered disability service providers
otherDirectories.notes: Filter by suburb/postcode and support type.

otherDirectories.name: ACNC Charity Register
otherDirectories.bestFor: Verifying any registered charity (financials, governance, ABN, contact)
otherDirectories.notes: Use to confirm an org is a legitimate, currently-funded charity.

otherDirectories.name: ABN Lookup
otherDirectories.bestFor: Confirming any business/charity ABN, trading name, GST status
otherDirectories.notes: Free public register.

otherDirectories.name: Carer Gateway
otherDirectories.bestFor: Unpaid family/friend carer support — counselling, peer support, planning
otherDirectories.notes: Centralised carer-support entry point.

otherDirectories.name: WentWest — Western Sydney PHN HealthPathways
otherDirectories.bestFor: GP clinical pathways, WS-specific care navigation
otherDirectories.notes: Primarily for GPs; some public-facing service info.

otherDirectories.name: South Western Sydney PHN Services
otherDirectories.bestFor: Mental health, AOD, chronic disease services across SWS
otherDirectories.notes: PHN-commissioned services directory.

otherDirectories.name: Western Sydney Local Health District (WSLHD)
otherDirectories.coverage: Blacktown, Cumberland, The Hills, Parramatta, Auburn
otherDirectories.bestFor: Public hospitals, community health, drug health, mental health
otherDirectories.notes: Service directory under 'Our Services'.

otherDirectories.name: South Western Sydney Local Health District (SWSLHD)
otherDirectories.coverage: Bankstown, Liverpool, Fairfield, Campbelltown, Camden, Wingecarribee, Wollondilly
otherDirectories.bestFor: Public hospitals, community health, refugee health, drug health
otherDirectories.notes: Refugee Health Service is listed under SWSLHD.

otherDirectories.name: Community Legal Centres NSW
otherDirectories.bestFor: Free legal advice — DV, tenancy, immigration, debt, criminal
otherDirectories.notes: Find a centre by suburb.

otherDirectories.name: LawAccess NSW
otherDirectories.bestFor: Free legal phone advice / referrals (1300 888 529)
otherDirectories.notes: Triage to community legal centres or Legal Aid.

otherDirectories.name: NSW Health AOD Service Directory
otherDirectories.bestFor: Drug & alcohol treatment — detox, rehab, counselling, opioid treatment
otherDirectories.notes: Filter by suburb/postcode and service type.

otherDirectories.name: AH&MRC — Aboriginal Health & Medical Research Council
otherDirectories.bestFor: Aboriginal Community Controlled Health Services (ACCHS)
otherDirectories.notes: Members include Marrin Weejali, Tharawal, AMS Western Sydney.

otherDirectories.name: NACCHO Member Map
otherDirectories.operator: National Aboriginal Community Controlled Health Organisation
otherDirectories.bestFor: Aboriginal Community Controlled Health Services
otherDirectories.notes: AH&MRC member orgs roll up here.

otherDirectories.name: Refugee Council of Australia — Service Directory
otherDirectories.bestFor: Refugee/asylum-seeker support, settlement, casework, legal
otherDirectories.notes: Curated list maintained by RCOA.

otherDirectories.name: Settlement Services Programme directory
otherDirectories.bestFor: SCS-funded settlement services for new migrants
otherDirectories.notes: Lists SSI, CORE, MDSI, Auburn Diversity, etc.

otherDirectories.name: Carer Gateway
otherDirectories.bestFor: Carer support — emergency respite, counselling, peer support
otherDirectories.notes: Regional partner network across NSW.

otherDirectories.name: headspace Centres Map
otherDirectories.bestFor: Youth (12-25) mental health centres
otherDirectories.notes: WS sites: Castle Hill, Mount Druitt, Liverpool.

otherDirectories.name: 1800RESPECT Service Finder
otherDirectories.bestFor: DV/sexual assault crisis support and referrals

otherDirectories.name: DV Connect / DV Line NSW
otherDirectories.bestFor: DV crisis support and refuge referrals (1800 656 463)
otherDirectories.notes: 24/7 NSW DV statewide line.

otherDirectories.name: Link2Home NSW
otherDirectories.bestFor: Homelessness intake — temporary accommodation, refuges

otherDirectories.name: Service NSW Community Services Directory
otherDirectories.bestFor: Government services, concessions, family support
otherDirectories.notes: Search by life event.

otherDirectories.name: Community Builders NSW
otherDirectories.bestFor: Locally-funded community services by LGA
otherDirectories.notes: DCJ-funded community development programs.

otherDirectories.name: My Community Directory
otherDirectories.bestFor: Local services by suburb, including small/grassroots orgs
otherDirectories.notes: Free, searchable by postcode.

otherDirectories.name: Volunteering NSW Directory
otherDirectories.bestFor: Volunteer-involving organisations + opportunities
otherDirectories.notes: Many orgs in the directory rely on volunteers.

otherDirectories.name: NCOSS Member Directory
otherDirectories.operator: Council of Social Service of NSW
otherDirectories.bestFor: Peak body members across the NSW community sector
otherDirectories.notes: WSCF and DVNSW are NCOSS members.

otherDirectories.name: MHCC NSW — Mental Health Coordinating Council
otherDirectories.bestFor: Community mental health sector members + workforce resources
otherDirectories.notes: Neami, One Door, Aftercare etc. are MHCC members.

otherDirectories.name: Wayback Machine
otherDirectories.bestFor: Recovering historical websites for orgs that have closed/moved
otherDirectories.notes: Useful when an org's current site is down — search by domain.
